responses: Greetings! I am the College Helpdesk Assistant. How may I assist you today?
Hello! Welcome to the college inquiry system. Please let me know what information you need.
Good day. I am here to answer your queries regarding admissions, exams, and other college activities.
Welcome! How can I help you with your academic inquiries today?

patterns: How can I apply for admission?
When do admissions open for the next academic year?
What are the eligibility criteria for B.Tech?
Is there an entrance exam for admission?
List of documents required for admission
Can I get admission through management quota?
Where can I find the admission form?
I want to join this college
responses: Admissions operate based on state-level counseling and management quota availability. Please visit the administration block for specific details.
The admission process usually commences in May. Candidates must qualify in the entrance exam or apply via the management quota.
For admission queries, please bring your 10th and 12th-grade mark sheets, transfer certificate, and identification proof to the administrative office.
You can find the official application forms and detailed eligibility criteria on the college website under the 'Admissions' section.

patterns: What courses does the college offer?
Do you have a Computer Science department?
Is there a Mechanical Engineering stream?
What are the available B.Tech programs?
Do you offer Electronics and Communication Engineering?
Which branches have the most seats?
Tell me about the academic programs
What degrees can I get here?
responses: The college offers B.Tech programs in Computer Science (CSE), Electronics & Communication (ECE), Electrical & Electronics (EEE), Mechanical (ME), and Civil Engineering (CE).
We provide undergraduate courses in CSE, IT, ECE, EEE, Mechanical, and Civil Engineering. AI and Data Science specializations are also available.
Our academic streams include traditional engineering branches like Mechanical and Civil, as well as modern disciplines like CSE and AI/ML.
You can choose from a variety of engineering disciplines including CSE, ECE, EEE, Mechanical, and Civil Engineering.

patterns: Where can I see the exam schedule?
Has the time table been released?
Dates for the semester end examinations
Is the date sheet out yet?
When is the next semester exam?
When do we get the timetable?
responses: The exam timetable is displayed on the main notice board and the college website's examination portal.
Semester exams vary by academic year. Please check the official circulars sent to your department for the exact schedule.
The Controller of Examinations releases the schedule two weeks prior to the exams. Please refer to the official notification.
You can view the latest exam schedule and date sheets on the examination section of the college website.

patterns: What is the exam fee amount?
How do I pay the exam fee?
Is there a late fee for exam registration?
Last date to pay the examination fee
Can I pay the exam fee online?
What is the condonation fee structure?
Whom do I contact for fee payment issues?
How much to pay for supply?
responses: The examination fee must be paid through the official college portal or at the accounts section before the deadline.
Please refer to the latest fee notification for the exact amount. Late payments attract a penalty as per the university norms.
Exam fees vary depending on the course and semester. Payment links are active on the student portal during the registration period.
You may pay the exam fee online or via bank challan. Please ensure payment is made before the specified last date to avoid late fees.

patterns: How can I get a library card?
Is the library open on weekends?
How many books can I borrow at once?
Is there a fine for returning books late?
responses: The central library functions from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM on working days. The reference section is open until 8:00 PM.
Students are eligible to borrow up to 3 books for a period of 15 days using their library card. Late returns incur a daily fine.
To obtain a library card, please submit your admission receipt and an ID size photograph at the librarian's desk.
The digital library and journal archives can be accessed using your student login credentials within the campus network.

patterns: How are the placements in this college?
Which companies visit for campus drives?
What is the highest salary package offered?
Does the college provide placement training?
Are internships converted to full-time jobs?
responses: The Training and Placement Cell actively coordinates campus drives. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Accenture.
Our college has a dedicated placement department that provides pre-placement training. The highest package last year was 12 LPA.
Students are eligible for placements from the final year. The average package offered ranges between 3.5 LPA to 5 LPA.
Detailed placement statistics and the list of visiting companies are available in the placement brochure at the T&P office.

patterns: Is an internship mandatory for B.Tech?
How can I apply for summer internships?
Can I do an internship in the 3rd year?
Does the college provide internship letters?
Process to get an internship NOC
How to get a recommendation letter?
responses: Internships are encouraged and often mandatory for 3rd-year students. The college assists in providing recommendation letters.
You can apply for internships during the summer or winter break. Please contact your Head of Department for the NOC issuance.
Detailed guidelines regarding internship credits and project work are available in the academic handbook.
The placement cell shares internship opportunities from various industry partners via the student notice board and email.

patterns: What is the college phone number?
Contact details for the admission office
How to reach the administration block?
Who should I contact for urgent issues?
responses: You can reach the college administration at 040-12345678 or email us at info@college.edu.in.
The college is located at Main Road, Knowledge City. The admission office is open Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 5 PM.
For official correspondence, please use the email contact@college.edu.in or visit the reception desk in the main administrative block.
General inquiries can be directed to the front office helpline. Specific department contacts are listed on the website.
Goodbye! Feel free to return if you have more questions.
Thank you for reaching out. Have a wonderful day ahead!
Session ended. You are welcome to contact the helpdesk again anytime.
Goodbye. We wish you success in your academic pursuits.

patterns: Show me the academic calendar for this year

JNTUH academic calendar for exams and holidays

responses: You can view the academic calendar for all semesters on the official academic calendar page of Pallavi Engineering College, which adheres to JNTUH guidelines. Visit the Academic Calendar section for downloadable PDF links.
The academic calendar includes semester dates, exam schedules, and holidays for each year. Please refer to the official calendar on the college website.

patterns: What is the fee structure for B.Tech?
What are the hostel and tuition fees?
Where can I find fee details?
Is there a separate fee for transport?
responses: Pallavi Engineering College publishes its fee structure including tuition and other charges on the official fee particulars page. Please check the Fee Particulars section on the college website for accurate details.
Fees vary by course and year. Tuition fees are available on the official fee page, and hostel/transport charges are listed separately.

patterns: What is the official website of Pallavi Engineering College?
Where can I find official notices?
How do I reach official college site?
responses: The official website for Pallavi Engineering College is https://www.pallaviengineeringcollege.ac.in where you can find information on admissions, academics, fees, and more.
Visit the college website at https://www.pallaviengineeringcollege.ac.in to view official updates, academic calendars, and contact information.

patterns: Is there hostel facility on campus?
Do they have separate boys and girls hostels?
Can I stay in hostel here?
responses: Pallavi Engineering College provides hostel accommodation with separate hostels for boys and girls. The hostels have facilities like gardens, study areas, and basic amenities.
For hostel applications and rules, please contact the college hostel administration or visit the campus office for detailed guidance.

patterns: How can I apply for internships?
Does the college help with industry internships?
How do I sign up for training?
responses: The Training and Placement Cell arranges internship opportunities and industrial visits for students. Some companies and labs collaborate for internships.
You can apply for internships through placement cell notices or contact the T&P office for available internship programs.

patterns: How do I contact the placement team?
responses: The Training & Placement Cell at PEC is headed by the Training & Placements Officer. You can reach them at +91-9398891087 or via email at directorcorporaterelations@pallaviengineeringcollege.ac.in / tpo@pallaviengineeringcollege.ac.in.
Contact the placement cell for internship and placement support using the official placement emails and phone numbers provided on the college website.

patterns: Holiday list for this academic year
Academic calendar for Pallavi Engineering College
When is the JNTUH semester starting?
responses: Pallavi Engineering College follows the academic calendar prescribed by JNTUH. The calendar includes semester start and end dates, holidays, and examination periods.
The latest JNTUH academic calendar is published on the university website and the college notice board. Students are advised to refer only to official notifications.
All academic activities at Pallavi Engineering College are conducted strictly according to the JNTUH academic calendar.

patterns: How much is the college fee?
Is there a fee for labs?
responses: The tuition fee at Pallavi Engineering College is fixed as per TSCHE and JNTUH norms. The approved fee structure is available on the official college website.
Hostel, transport, and other miscellaneous fees are charged separately and may vary depending on the facilities chosen.
For the most accurate and updated fee details, students should contact the college accounts section or visit the official website.

patterns: How to apply for Pallavi Engineering College?
Steps to join Pallavi Engineering College
Can I visit for admission info?
responses: Admissions to Pallavi Engineering College are primarily through TS EAMCET counseling as per JNTUH guidelines.
Management quota admissions are also available. Interested candidates can directly visit the college admission office with required documents.
Detailed admission guidelines are published on the official college website every academic year.

patterns: What is the official website of Pallavi Engineering College?
Where can I find official notices?
responses: The official website of Pallavi Engineering College is https://www.pallaviengineeringcollege.ac.in
All official notifications, academic calendars, fee details, and admission updates are published on the college website.

responses: Pallavi Engineering College is located at Kuntloor Village, Hayathnagar, Ranga Reddy District, Hyderabad â€“ 501505, Telangana.
You can contact the college at +91-9247528134 / +91-9247528135 or email info@pallaviengineeringcollege.ac.in.
For admissions, students may contact admissions@pallaviengineeringcollege.ac.in or visit the administration block.
Several reputed companies visit Pallavi Engineering College for campus placements, including TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, Capgemini, Cognizant, and other IT firms.

patterns: Who got placed from this college?
List of students hired by Wipro
responses: Several students from the Computer Science and Engineering department have been placed in reputed companies such as TCS, ZOGNU, and BOSTAN IT Solutions with packages ranging from 3.5 to 5.5 LPA.
The college regularly highlights successful student placements through official placement reports and department notices.

patterns: Tell me about Pallavi Engineering College
responses: Pallavi Engineering College is an AICTE approved institution affiliated to JNTUH, Hyderabad. The college offers undergraduate engineering programs with a focus on quality education and industry readiness.
The college is known for its academic discipline, qualified faculty, and training-oriented approach to placements and skill development.

patterns: Which university is the college affiliated to?
Is Pallavi Engineering College under JNTUH?
Is this college approved by AICTE?
Is this a government approved college?
responses: Pallavi Engineering College is approved by AICTE, New Delhi and is affiliated to Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH).
All degrees awarded by the college are valid and recognized as per AICTE and JNTUH norms.

patterns: How to reach Pallavi Engineering College?
How far is the college from Hyderabad?
How can students travel to college?
responses: Pallavi Engineering College is located at Kuntloor Village, Hayathnagar, Ranga Reddy District, Hyderabad, Telangana.
The college provides transportation facilities through buses from various parts of the city. Students may contact the transport office for route details.

patterns: What happens if attendance is low?
What if I have health issues?
Can I see my attendance online?
responses: As per JNTUH norms, students are required to maintain a minimum attendance percentage to be eligible for examinations.
Students with attendance shortages may be required to apply for condonation as per university rules. Please refer to official notifications.

patterns: Where can I check exam results?
Check results by hall ticket number
responses: Semester examination results are published on the official JNTUH results portal and are also notified by the college.
Students are advised to check results only through official university websites or college notifications.

patterns: How to apply for study certificate?
responses: Students can apply for bonafide, study, and conduct certificates at the administrative office by submitting a written request.
Transfer certificates and original documents are issued as per JNTUH and college regulations after course completion.
Pallavi Engineering College provides student support services including grievance redressal, counseling, and anti-ragging committees.
Students can approach the concerned department or administrative office for assistance and support.
